notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story grounds into a force out, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt. Masataka Yoshida scores. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Trevor Story advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman JJ Wetherholt.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story steals (1) home. Marcelo Mayer steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn plunked
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn hit by pitch. Jordan Walker to 2nd.
